description: Correlation ID logging for distributed tracing and debugging across service boundaries

evals.prompt: How do I create a structured logger with correlation IDs?
evals.expected_output: Structured logger initialization with correlation ID and context

evals.prompt: How do I propagate correlation IDs across service boundaries?
evals.expected_output: Correlation ID propagation through HTTP headers and async contexts
assertions: Includes correlation ID propagation to downstream services
Demonstrates logging with same correlation ID across services

evals.prompt: What log levels are available and when should I use each?
evals.expected_output: Log level guidance: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR with use cases
assertions: Lists ERROR for failures requiring attention

evals.prompt: How can I query and filter structured logs?
evals.expected_output: Log querying with filters for correlation ID, level, time range, and context

evals.prompt: How do I store and retrieve logs from KV storage?
evals.expected_output: KV-based log storage with batching and retrieval patterns
